message:
fix(dolt): bump DefaultMaxConnections from 200 to 1000

Tim Sehn confirmed Dolt's own default is 1,000 and there's no reason
to artificially limit below that. Our previous 200 cap was based on
conservative math (10 conns/pool × 15 processes) that underestimated
actual concurrent agent load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -79,7 +79,7 @@ Check resource usage and detect anomalies.
 ```sql
 SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST;
 ```
-Warn if >= 80% of max connections (50).
+Warn if >= 80% of max connections (1000).
 
 **2. Disk usage:**
 Check data directory size. Warn if exceeding configured threshold.
